response: Looking for a place to call home in Pipa? 🏡🏠 Check out our house rental guide: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/12cNpzVMEKcWli3mr7anB3GEoVyZA46gUSvjI5qkO_EQ/edit?usp=drive_link]
Ready to explore Pipa on your own terms? 🚗💨 Our car rental guide can help you hit the road: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/15cI5q5h_qebVGLLvOeQ1u57_1LLFdfQ163W5xQgN8ZA/edit?usp=drive_link]
Stay safe in Pipa! 🚨🚑 Here's a handy guide with emergency numbers: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1M8XQBtICxPwpdwI6tFlEhjvKC8TakCY7jg95Sxg5a1w/edit?usp=drive_link]
Need a quick ride? 🚕🏍️  Send me a DM with the wod 'taxi'! I got you covered!
Planning to travel around by bus or van? 🚌🚐 Here's a guide with all the info you need: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1FKv3FqdYLfiVN4ctm42N_eTQcGPQwyMbYL4uZQ9VLtQ/edit?usp=drive_link]
Looking for a great place to work in Pipa? 💻🌴 We've got you covered! Check out our guide: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1zUC12DQOt_cBie-MzJ9OJB6k8E6Kh_gopnrIrWG6qS8/edit?usp=drive_link]
Stay connected with a local SIM card! 📱📶 Here's a guide to help you get set up: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/18f1ztJzEUv1dw0QxOJCT6iIe21D4wXYixrkgAh175Vg/edit?usp=drive_link]
Need help navigating visa requirements? 🛂🌍 Check out our comprehensive guide: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/152hwPUgFkQ12MeQtOjENb_GUTNoKvjApQGJl-8Wz3Gw/edit?usp=drive_link]
Want to stay fit while in Pipa? 💪🏋️ Check out our guide for gyms and Crossfit boxes: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gPJroYkDUaYnuFAUm7Prg-s1mR0lEnBtWqRdrKTzu7A/edit?usp=drive_link]
Ready to hit the sand and play some beach tennis? 🏖️🎾 Check out our guide: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/12E7UVMro9OzccqmaKdOyp45YID9a11mGsNHzMxTf5gQ/edit?usp=drive_link]
Need access to our shared drive with helpful resources? 📂🔗 Here you go: [https://tinyurl.com/PipaDNDrive]
🤖💬 Beep boop! I see you want to understand how I work. Check t: [https://github.com/nomads-pipa/bot]
Did I hear someone mention... weed?! where bro? If you find some you better give it to me 🍁🌿🚬

🏄🏽‍♀️🌊🏄🏻‍♂️ If you want to learn to surf while in Pipa, rent a board, or some cool footage/pictures of your sessions, check out the info here: [https://docs.google.com/document/d/12_tQw7GJ9aFi9PKwSOWgss1E1e_bvaGi9RygNLyXZr4/edit?usp=drivesdk]
Please refer to the form to add someone to the group: http://bit.ly/4ftWZDG
